textByHashes.f8ef24c755777a4ef75df773017f65ad978ade49: Is my wife asking priests to visit me now? I'm a man of science for god's sake. I know she means well but it's only a little cough!
textByHashes.2d4e2fb91117ada92368778d1963e777a4b07ece: Well it's not killed me yet. So what do you want?
textByHashes.b9f3fa28f959a5a93e3b8afde75008c261221a20: You mean the plague of West Ardougne?
textByHashes.c5036f18a508b77319cc4af522231201420b7ef4: Right then, sounds like we'd better get to work!
textByHashes.11f73f41ab83d9341ba87669d8f31d9dfd4c2490: Now I'll be needing some liquid honey, some sulphuric broline, and then...
textByHashes.10e320b569018f1ed426df102bf5ce592b17b5c7: Look, I need all three reagents to test the plague sample. Come back when you've got them.
textByHashes.812a6f407c73a83edb543af9d49021079323b68a: Oh. You don't have any touch paper. I won't be able to help after all.
textByHashes.5ca271bccfa660adb597a9fce11862dca2d141a0: Seems like you don't actually have the plague sample. It's a long way to come empty handed... and quite a long way back too.
textByHashes.8a6ead5a5556e8782199415b1c48c611fdc49fb3: Now I'll just apply these to the sample and... I don't get it... the touch paper has remained the same.
textByHashes.e0693179ddd6898f0171998f6e56dcfa1d18c0ee: Well that's just it, nothing has happened. I don't know what this sample is, but it certainly isn't toxic.
textByHashes.f1b2b95e7507cc4922433046bee2159cffb17b13: This result can only mean one thing... there is no plague. It seems that someone has been lying about all of it. The only question is... why?
textByHashes.3a2b91d12b7c597ba3cf802b93a9ffbc3cc090dc: Well, hello traveller. I still can't understand why they would lie about the plague.
textByHashes.aa1f2774302cf819775925b2a66adb3efd39f2f8: I don't really want any visitors just now.
